name.description: Name of the DynamoDB project to generate
name.x-prompt: What name would you like your DynamoDB project to have? i.e: MyTable

directory.description: The directory to store the project in.
directory.x-prompt: Which directory do you want to create the project in?

subDirectory.description: The sub directory the project is placed in. By default this is the project name.
subDirectory.x-prompt: Which sub directory do you want to create the project in? (By default this is the project name)

framework.description: The framework to use for DynamoDB entities.

x-prompt.message: Which framework would you like to use for DynamoDB entities?

tableName.description: The DynamoDB table name. Auto-generated if not specified.

infra.description: Infrastructure to provision for the DynamoDB table.
infra.x-prompt: Which infrastructure would you like to provision?

iac.description: The preferred IaC provider. By default this is inherited from your initial selection.
iac.x-prompt: Which provider would you like to manage your infrastructure? (default: Inherit)

module.description: Module format for generated TypeScript code and configuration. 'infer' uses ESM if the workspace root package.json is 'type': 'module', otherwise CommonJS.

preferInstallDependencies.description: Whether to prefer installing dependencies after the generator runs. Set to false to defer installing when batching multiple generators (an install still runs if needed so subsequent generators can compute the Nx project graph); install once at the end.
